name: User Management
overview: Group policy templates, account lifecycle, and password hygiene for existing Jellyfin users.
description: User Management brings policy, lifecycle, and password hygiene to accounts that already exist on your Jellyfin server. Define group permission templates with live sync, set account expiry and auto-disable inactive users, and enforce password requirements (with an optional HaveIBeenPwned breach check) - all from the dashboard, no second process required.
